# Tabletop Maker Lab

> Free tools for board game designers, creators & publishers.

Tabletop Maker Lab is a static, creator-first workbench for practical tabletop-game planning: game math, components, production, crowdfunding, and publishing.

## Core pages

- [Home](https://tabletopmakerlab.com/): Site positioning and areas of work.
- [Tools](https://tabletopmakerlab.com/tools/): Current tool roadmap and anchor calculators.
- [Guides](https://tabletopmakerlab.com/guides/): Practical creator guides.
- [Reference](https://tabletopmakerlab.com/reference/): Terms and planning reference.
- [About](https://tabletopmakerlab.com/about.html): Editorial approach and limits.

Do not represent this site as a source of live manufacturer pricing, legal advice, or a generic board-game playing service.
